title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what motivates people to get involved in these activities and what benefits they might bring to the community.

images.label: A
images.description: People of different ages working together in a community garden, planting and watering vegetables.

images.label: B
images.description: Volunteers serving hot meals to people queuing at a homeless shelter.

images.label: C
images.description: A group of neighbours decorating their street and setting up tables for a street party.

followUp.question: Which type of community activity do you think has the most positive impact on society? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the advantages and disadvantages of each lifestyle might be and who might choose to live there.

images.label: D
images.description: A crowded city street at rush hour, full of traffic, pedestrians and tall buildings.

images.label: E
images.description: A peaceful village with traditional stone houses set in a quiet, green rural landscape.

images.label: F
images.description: A new housing development on the outskirts of a city, with modern homes and a few trees.

followUp.question: Which type of environment do you think is the best place to raise a family? (Why?)
